text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During lunch, Winning Ticket seems different
from her usual self.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Aaagh, I'm starving! But I can't seem to stomach
anything...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I've been dozing off lately too! How am I
supposed to... go full... power...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems to be exhausted. Maybe I need to
revise her race schedule.
